from decimal import Decimal, ROUND_HALF_EVEN

import billing.allocation as allocation_module
from billing.allocation import allocate
from billing.money import minor_unit, round_minor


def test_money_contract_exposes_native_precision_and_tie_policy():
    assert minor_unit("BHD") == Decimal("0.001")
    assert round_minor(Decimal("1.2345"), "BHD") == Decimal("1.234")


def test_allocation_conserves_residuals_with_money_helpers_isolated(monkeypatch):
    unit = Decimal("0.001")
    monkeypatch.setattr(allocation_module, "minor_unit", lambda currency: unit, raising=False)
    monkeypatch.setattr(
        allocation_module,
        "round_minor",
        lambda amount, currency: Decimal(amount).quantize(unit, rounding=ROUND_HALF_EVEN),
    )
    shares = allocation_module.allocate(Decimal("-0.007"), [1, 1, 1], "TEST")
    assert shares == [Decimal("-0.003"), Decimal("-0.002"), Decimal("-0.002")]
    assert sum(shares) == Decimal("-0.007")


def test_integrated_three_decimal_allocation_preserves_invoice_total():
    shares = allocate(Decimal("0.011"), [2, 3, 5], "BHD")
    assert shares == [Decimal("0.002"), Decimal("0.003"), Decimal("0.006")]
    assert sum(shares) == Decimal("0.011")
